# Vježba 10 — Realni Bernoulli

## Fizikalni uvod: Dinamika realnog fluida i gubici energije

U realnim fluidima, gibanje slojeva fluida praćeno je unutarnjim trenjem (viskoznošću), što dovodi do neizbježne **disipacije mehaničke energije u toplinu**. Za razliku od idealnog fluida, kod realnog strujanja ukupna energija duž strujnice neprestano opada.

Bernoullijeva jednadžba za realni fluid između dva presjeka (1) i (2) glasi:
$$\frac{p_1}{\rho g} + \frac{v_1^2}{2g} + z_1 = \frac{p_2}{\rho g} + \frac{v_2^2}{2g} + z_2 + \mathbf{h_{g,1-2}}$$

Član $\mathbf{h_{g,1-2}}$ [m] predstavlja **ukupan gubitak energije** (napor), koji se u inženjerskoj praksi dijeli na:
1.  **Linijske gubitke ($h_l$):** Nastaju uslijed trenja fluida o stijenke cijevi na ravnim dionicama. Računaju se pomoću Darcy-Weisbachove jednadžbe ($h_l = \lambda \frac{L}{D} \frac{v^2}{2g}$).
2.  **Lokalne gubitke ($h_{loc}$):** Uzrokovani su promjenom geometrije strujnog polja (koljena, ventili, suženja ili proširenja) koja izaziva vrtloženje i odvajanje struje ($h_{loc} = \xi \frac{v^2}{2g}$).

Praktična posljedica ovih gubitaka je da energetska linija **EGL (Energy Grade Line)** više nije horizontalna, već ima konstantan pad u smjeru strujanja. Nagib ove linije ($I = h_g / L$) naziva se **hidraulički nagib**.

### Mjerenje brzine i protoka

Za precizno mjerenje brzine strujanja realnog fluida najčešće koristimo **Pitot-statičku cijev** (Prandtlovu cijev). Ona mjeri razliku između ukupnog i statičkog tlaka:
1.  **Statički tlak ($p$):** Tlak koji fluid vrši na stijenke (mjeri se bočnim otvorima cijevi).
2.  **Ukupni (stagnacijski) tlak ($p_0$):** Tlak na samom vrhu cijevi gdje se fluid potpuno zaustavi ($v=0$).
3.  **Dinamički tlak:** Razlika $p_0 - p = \frac{\rho v^2}{2}$.

Iz te razlike direktno računamo brzinu u točki mjerenja: $v = \sqrt{\frac{2(p_0 - p)}{\rho}}$.

***

### Energetska bilanca: Idealni vs. Realni fluid

Kod realnih fluida dio energije se nepovratno gubi na svladavanje otpora trenja. Ovaj widget zorno prikazuje razliku u energetskim linijama (EGL) između idealnog slučaja bez gubitaka i realnog slučaja s gubicima.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Ideal vs Real Fluid -->
<div id="v10-ideal-real-widget" style="max-width: 950px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 25px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">📉 Vizualizacija gubitaka: Idealni vs. Realni fluid</h4>

    <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;">
        <strong>Kako čitati usporedbu:</strong> U oba slučaja ista brzina daje istu brzinsku visinu <strong>v²/2g</strong>, ali samo realni fluid gubi dodatni dio energije kroz <strong>h<sub>w</sub></strong>. Zato u desnom panelu EGL pada niz cijev, a njegov nagib <strong>I = h<sub>w</sub>/L</strong> izravno mjeri koliko se energije gubi po metru cijevi.
    </div>
    
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 20px;">
        <!-- Lijevo: Idealno -->
        <div style="background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 15px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
            <h5 style="text-align: center; margin: 0 0 15px 0; color: #3b82f6;">IDEALNI FLUID (hw = 0)</h5>
            <canvas id="ideal-canvas" width="400" height="300" style="width: 100%; border-radius: 8px; background: white;"></canvas>
        </div>
        <!-- Desno: Realno -->
        <div style="background: #fef2f2; border-radius: 15px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #fee2e2;">
            <h5 style="text-align: center; margin: 0 0 15px 0; color: #ef4444;">REALNI FLUID (Darcy-Weisbach)</h5>
            <canvas id="real-canvas" width="400" height="300" style="width: 100%; border-radius: 8px; background: white;"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(210px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; margin-top: 25px; padding: 20px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 15px;">
        <div class="control-group">
            <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #475569;">Faktor trenja λ: <span id="v10-v-f" style="color:#ef4444;">0.030</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="v10-f-slider" min="0.01" max="0.08" step="0.005" value="0.03" style="width: 100%;">
        </div>
        <div class="control-group">
            <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #475569;">Duljina cijevi L: <span id="v10-v-L" style="color:#2563eb;">20</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="v10-L-slider" min="5" max="50" step="1" value="20" style="width: 100%;">
        </div>
        <div class="control-group">
            <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #475569;">Brzina v₀: <span id="v10-v-v" style="color:#2563eb;">2.0</span> m/s</label>
            <input type="range" id="v10-v-slider" min="0.5" max="5" step="0.1" value="2" style="width: 100%;">
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(140px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; margin-top: 20px;">
        <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
            <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">v²/2g</div>
            <div id="v10-vhead-out" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.98rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m</div>
        </div>
        <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
            <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">h_w</div>
            <div id="v10-hw-card" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.98rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m</div>
        </div>
        <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
            <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">Hidraulički nagib I</div>
            <div id="v10-slope-out" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.98rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.000</div>
        </div>
        <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
            <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">D/L utjecaj</div>
            <div id="v10-ld-out" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.98rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.0</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div id="v10-loss-summary" style="margin-top: 20px; padding: 15px; background: #2d3748; color: white; border-radius: 12px; text-align: center;">
        Ukupni gubitak visine dobave <b>h<sub>w</sub></b> = <span id="v10-hw-out" style="color:#fc8181; font-size: 1.2rem;">---</span> m
    </div>

    <div style="margin-top: 16px; padding: 14px 16px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fdba74; border-radius: 12px; color: #7c2d12; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.55;">
        <strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="v10-explainer"></span>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const idealCanvas = document.getElementById('ideal-canvas');
    const realCanvas = document.getElementById('real-canvas');
    const idealCtx = idealCanvas.getContext('2d');
    const realCtx = realCanvas.getContext('2d');
    const fSlider = document.getElementById('v10-f-slider');
    const lSlider = document.getElementById('v10-L-slider');
    const vSlider = document.getElementById('v10-v-slider');

    const state = {
        lam: parseFloat(fSlider.value),
        length: parseFloat(lSlider.value),
        velocity: parseFloat(vSlider.value),
        headLoss: 0
    };
    const particles = Array.from({ length: 28 }, (_, index) => ({
        t: index / 28,
        offset: (index % 3) - 1
    }));

    function updateState() {
        state.lam = parseFloat(fSlider.value);
        state.length = parseFloat(lSlider.value);
        state.velocity = parseFloat(vSlider.value);

        const g = 9.81;
        const diameter = 0.15;
        const vHead = state.velocity * state.velocity / (2 * g);
        state.headLoss = state.lam * (state.length / diameter) * vHead;
        const slope = state.headLoss / state.length;

        document.getElementById('v10-v-f').innerText = state.lam.toFixed(3);
        document.getElementById('v10-v-L').innerText = state.length.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('v10-v-v').innerText = state.velocity.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('v10-hw-out').innerText = state.headLoss.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('v10-vhead-out').innerText = vHead.toFixed(2) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('v10-hw-card').innerText = state.headLoss.toFixed(2) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('v10-slope-out').innerText = slope.toFixed(3);
        document.getElementById('v10-ld-out').innerText = (state.length / diameter).toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('v10-explainer').textContent = `Za brzinu ${state.velocity.toFixed(1)} m/s brzinska visina iznosi ${vHead.toFixed(2)} m. U realnom slučaju faktor trenja λ = ${state.lam.toFixed(3)} i omjer L/D = ${(state.length / diameter).toFixed(1)} pretvaraju tu energiju u ukupni gubitak ${state.headLoss.toFixed(2)} m, pa EGL pada nagibom I = ${slope.toFixed(3)} m/m duž cijevi.`;
    }

    function drawScene(ctx, isReal) {
        const width = ctx.canvas.width;
        const height = ctx.canvas.height;
        const marginX = 34;
        const surfaceY = 92;
        const baseY = 236;
        const pipeY = 206;
        const pipeStart = 82;
        const pipeEnd = 330;
        const outletX = 352;
        const outletY = 224;
        const g = 9.81;
        const velocityHead = state.velocity * state.velocity / (2 * g);
        const energyScale = 16;
        const headLossPx = isReal ? state.headLoss * energyScale : 0;

        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#ffffff";
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);

        ctx.fillStyle = isReal ? "#fff1f2" : "#eff6ff";
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);

        ctx.strokeStyle = "#cbd5e1";
        ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(marginX, baseY + 34);
        ctx.lineTo(width - marginX, baseY + 34);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = "#dbeafe";
        ctx.fillRect(marginX, surfaceY, 66, baseY - surfaceY);
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#475569";
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.strokeRect(marginX, surfaceY, 66, baseY - surfaceY);

        ctx.strokeStyle = "#94a3b8";
        ctx.lineWidth = 16;
        ctx.lineCap = "round";
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(pipeStart, pipeY);
        ctx.lineTo(pipeEnd, pipeY);
        ctx.lineTo(outletX, outletY);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = "#ef4444";
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        const eglInletY = surfaceY;
        const eglOutletY = eglInletY + headLossPx;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(pipeStart, eglInletY);
        ctx.lineTo(pipeEnd, eglOutletY);
        ctx.lineTo(outletX + 14, eglOutletY);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = "#2563eb";
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.setLineDash([7, 6]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(pipeStart, eglInletY - velocityHead * energyScale);
        ctx.lineTo(pipeEnd, eglOutletY - velocityHead * energyScale);
        ctx.lineTo(outletX + 14, eglOutletY - velocityHead * energyScale);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        ctx.fillStyle = "#ef4444";
        ctx.font = "bold 11px Inter";
        ctx.fillText("EGL", pipeStart - 34, eglInletY + 4);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#2563eb";
        ctx.fillText("HGL", pipeStart - 34, eglInletY - velocityHead * energyScale + 4);

        particles.forEach((particle) => {
            particle.t += 0.0025 * state.velocity;
            if (particle.t > 1) particle.t -= 1;
            const x = pipeStart + particle.t * (outletX - pipeStart);
            const localSlope = (outletY - pipeY) / (outletX - pipeStart);
            const yCenter = pipeY + (x - pipeStart) * localSlope;
            const y = yCenter + particle.offset * 3;
            ctx.fillStyle = isReal ? "#ef4444" : "#3b82f6";
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(x, y, 2.3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        });

        ctx.fillStyle = "#0f172a";
        ctx.font = "600 11px Inter";
        ctx.fillText(isReal ? "Pad energije zbog trenja" : "Bez gubitka energije", 124, 30);
        ctx.fillText("hw = " + (isReal ? state.headLoss.toFixed(2) : "0.00") + " m", 250, 282);
    }

    function animate() {
        drawScene(idealCtx, false);
        drawScene(realCtx, true);
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    }

    [fSlider, lSlider, vSlider].forEach((slider) => slider.addEventListener('input', updateState));
    updateState();
    animate();
})();
</script>
```

***

### Fizikalne osnove: Darcy-Weisbachova jednadžba

Gubitak energije pri strujanju realnog fluida kroz ravnu cijev opisuje se **Darcy-Weisbachovom jednadžbom**:
$$h_w = \lambda \cdot \frac{L}{D} \cdot \frac{v^2}{2g}$$

```{=html}
<div class="mf1-bridge">
    <h4>Konceptualni most</h4>
    <p>Uvodni widget iznad već pokazuje fizičku posljedicu gubitaka kroz pad EGL i HGL. Darcy-Weisbach ovdje služi kao kompaktan računski model: brzina ulazi kvadratno, geometrija kroz omjer $L/D$, a faktor trenja sažima utjecaj stijenke i režima strujanja.</p>
</div>
<div class="mf1-note-grid">
    <div class="mf1-kriterij">
        <h4>Kriterij primjene</h4>
        <ul>
            <li>Za ravne dionice prvo odvoji linijske gubitke od lokalnih gubitaka na ventilima, koljenima i suženjima.</li>
            <li>Ako brzinu udvostručiš, Darcy-Weisbachov gubitak raste približno četiri puta jer ulazi član $v^2$.</li>
            <li>Prije uvrštavanja pazi koristiš li promjer u metrima i jesu li svi članovi izraženi u visini energije po jediničnoj težini fluida.</li>
        </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="mf1-warning">
        <h4>Česta pogreška</h4>
        <p>Najčešća pogreška je zbrajati lokalne i linijske gubitke bez jasnog razdvajanja ili ubaciti tlakni pad $\Delta p$ kao da je već izražen u metrima stupca fluida. Prvo odluči radiš li u paskalima ili u visini dobave, pa tek onda pretvaraj.</p>
    </div>
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak Z86 — Sifon s realnim fluidom {.unnumbered}


Sifon sa slike napunjen je vodom pri čemu volumenski protok iznosi 150 [dm3/s]. Potrebno je odrediti gubitak visine dobave od točke 1 do točke 3 preko izraza $\frac{v^2}{2g}$. Potrebno je odrediti tlak u točki 2 ukoliko se dvije trećine ukupnih gubitaka visine dobave odvijaju između točke 1 i 2.

**Zadano:** $\dot{V} = 150 \, \text{dm}^3\text{/s}, d = 200 \, \text{mm}, z_1 = 1,5 \, \text{m}, z_2 = 3,5 \, \text{m}, z_3 = 0 \, \text{m}$, voda  
**Odrediti:** $h_{w1-3}, p_2$

**Rješenje:**
1. **Brzina:** $v = \frac{0,15}{\pi \cdot 0,1^2} = \mathbf{4,775 \, \text{m/s}}$.
2. **Ukupni gubitak:** $h_{w1-3} = (z_1 - z_3) - \frac{v^2}{2g} = 1,5 - 1,162 = \mathbf{0,338 \, \text{m}}$.
3. **Tlak u točki 2:** $\frac{p_2}{\rho g} = (z_1 - z_2) - \frac{v^2}{2g} - \frac{2}{3}h_{w1-3} = -2 - 1,162 - 0,225 = -3,387 \, \text{m} \implies p_2 = \mathbf{-33,2 \, \text{kPa}}$ (podtlak).

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Sifon s gubicima (EGL/HGL) -->
<div id="z86-siphon-losses-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">🌀 Sifon s gubicima: EGL, HGL i raspodjela tlaka</h4>

    <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;">
        <strong>Kako čitati zadatak:</strong> Iz protoka najprije dobivaš brzinu i brzinsku visinu <strong>v²/2g</strong>. Zatim se ukupni gubitak <strong>h<sub>w1-3}</sub></strong> dijeli između krakova 1→2 i 2→3, pa upravo gubitak u usisnom kraku dodatno snižava tlak u tjemenu sifona.
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 30px; align-items: start;">
        <!-- Visualization Canvas -->
        <div style="position: relative; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; overflow: hidden; height: 450px;">
            <canvas id="z86-canvas" width="550" height="450" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>

            <!-- Pressure at Apex Gauge (Mini) -->
            <div style="position: absolute; right: 20px; top: 20px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); padding: 10px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #cbd5e0; text-align: center;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 800; color: #64748b;">TLAK U TOČKI 2</div>
                <div id="z86-p2-val" style="font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 800; color: #ef4444;">-33.2 kPa</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Controls and Metrics -->
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px;">
            <div style="padding: 18px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #475569;">Raspodjela gubitaka (f): <span id="z86-v-f" style="color:#2563eb;">67%</span></label>
                <input type="range" id="z86-f-slider" min="0" max="1" step="0.05" value="0.67" style="width: 100%;">
                <p style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #64748b; margin-top: 5px;">Dio ukupnih gubitaka koji nastaje do tjemena (točke 2).</p>

                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 15px; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #475569;">Protok V̇: <span id="z86-v-vdot" style="color:#2563eb;">150</span> L/s</label>
                <input type="range" id="z86-vdot-slider" min="50" max="250" step="5" value="150" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>

            <div style="background: #ebf8ff; padding: 18px; border-radius: 15px; border-left: 6px solid #3182ce;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #2c5282; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 10px;">Bilanca gubitaka:</div>
                <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.9rem;">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><span>hw (1→2):</span> <b id="z86-hw12" style="color:#2b6cb0;">0.225 m</b></div>
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><span>hw (2→3):</span> <b id="z86-hw23" style="color:#2b6cb0;">0.113 m</b></div>
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; border-top: 1px solid #bee3f8; padding-top: 5px;"><span>Ukupni hw:</span> <b id="z86-hwtotal">0.338 m</b></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(130px, 1fr)); gap: 12px;">
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">Brzina v</div>
                    <div id="z86-v-out" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m/s</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">v²/2g</div>
                    <div id="z86-vhead-out" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">p₂/ρg</div>
                    <div id="z86-p2head-out" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fdba74; border-radius: 12px; color: #7c2d12; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.55;">
                <strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z86-explainer">Što je veći otpor u usisnom kraku sifona (1→2), to je tlak u tjemenu 2 niži (veći vakuum). Zato se usisni dio uvijek nastoji izvesti što kraće i šire.</span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z86-canvas'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const fS = document.getElementById('z86-f-slider'), vdotS = document.getElementById('z86-vdot-slider');

    let particles = [];
    for(let i=0; i<100; i++) particles.push(Math.random());
    const state = { z1: 1.5, z2: 3.5, z3: 0, vHead: 0, hw12: 0, hw23: 0, velocity: 0, p2Head: 0 };

    function recalculate() {
        const f = parseFloat(fS.value), vdot_l = parseFloat(vdotS.value);
        const rho = 1000, g = 9.81, d = 0.2; // 200mm promjer iz rješenja? (r=0.1)
        const A = Math.PI * d * d / 4;
        const v = (vdot_l / 1000) / A;

        // Geometry from task
        const z1 = 1.5, z3 = 0, z2 = 3.5; // Relativne visine (z1-z3=1.5, z2-z1=2)
        const v_head = v*v / (2*g);
        const hw_total = Math.max((z1 - z3) - v_head, 0);

        const hw12 = f * hw_total;
        const hw23 = (1-f) * hw_total;
        const p2_head = (z1 - z2) - v_head - hw12;
        const p2 = p2_head * rho * g;

        state.z1 = z1;
        state.z2 = z2;
        state.z3 = z3;
        state.vHead = v_head;
        state.hw12 = hw12;
        state.hw23 = hw23;
        state.velocity = v;
        state.p2Head = p2_head;

        document.getElementById('z86-v-f').innerText = (f*100).toFixed(0) + "%";
        document.getElementById('z86-v-vdot').innerText = vdot_l;
        document.getElementById('z86-hw12').innerText = hw12.toFixed(3) + " m";
        document.getElementById('z86-hw23').innerText = hw23.toFixed(3) + " m";
        document.getElementById('z86-hwtotal').innerText = hw_total.toFixed(3) + " m";
        document.getElementById('z86-p2-val').innerText = (p2/1000).toFixed(1) + " kPa";
        document.getElementById('z86-v-out').innerText = v.toFixed(2) + " m/s";
        document.getElementById('z86-vhead-out').innerText = v_head.toFixed(3) + " m";
        document.getElementById('z86-p2head-out').innerText = p2_head.toFixed(3) + " m";
        document.getElementById('z86-explainer').textContent = `Za protok ${vdot_l.toFixed(0)} L/s brzina u sifonu iznosi ${v.toFixed(2)} m/s, pa brzinska visina iznosi ${v_head.toFixed(3)} m. Od ukupnog gubitka ${hw_total.toFixed(3)} m, u kraku 1→2 otpada ${hw12.toFixed(3)} m, pa se glava tlaka u tjemenu spušta na ${p2_head.toFixed(3)} m, odnosno tlak na ${(p2/1000).toFixed(1)} kPa.`;
    }

    function draw() {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 550, 450);
        const scale = 80, ox = 100, oy = 350;

        // Coordinates
        const p1x = 100, p1y = oy - state.z1*scale;
        const p2x = 275, p2y = oy - state.z2*scale;
        const p3x = 450, p3y = oy - state.z3*scale;

        // Tanks
        ctx.fillStyle = "#ebf8ff"; ctx.fillRect(20, p1y, 100, (oy-p1y)+20);
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#475569"; ctx.lineWidth = 3; ctx.strokeRect(20, p1y, 100, (oy-p1y)+20);

        // Siphon Tube
        ctx.lineCap = "round"; ctx.lineJoin = "round";
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#cbd5e0"; ctx.lineWidth = 15;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(ox, p1y+50); ctx.lineTo(ox, p2y+20); ctx.arc(ox+20, p2y+20, 20, Math.PI, 1.5*Math.PI);
        ctx.lineTo(p3x-20, p2y); ctx.arc(p3x-20, p2y+20, 20, 1.5*Math.PI, 2*Math.PI); ctx.lineTo(p3x, p3y); ctx.stroke();

        // EGL Line (Red)
        const egl1 = p1y;
        const egl2 = p1y + state.hw12*scale;
        const egl3 = p1y + (state.hw12 + state.hw23)*scale;

        ctx.setLineDash([]); ctx.strokeStyle = "#ef4444"; ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(ox, egl1); ctx.lineTo(p2x, egl2); ctx.lineTo(p3x, egl3); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.fillStyle = "#ef4444"; ctx.font = "bold 10px Inter"; ctx.fillText("EGL", ox-30, egl1);

        // HGL Line (Blue Dashed)
        ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]); ctx.strokeStyle = "#3b82f6"; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(ox, egl1 + state.vHead*scale); ctx.lineTo(p2x, egl2 + state.vHead*scale); ctx.lineTo(p3x, egl3 + state.vHead*scale); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.fillStyle = "#3b82f6"; ctx.fillText("HGL", ox-30, egl1 + state.vHead*scale + 15);

        // Centerline Labels
        ctx.fillStyle = "#1e293b"; ctx.font = "bold 12px Inter";
        ctx.fillText("1", ox-15, p1y); ctx.fillText("2", p2x, p2y - 15); ctx.fillText("3", p3x + 10, p3y);
        ctx.font = "11px Inter";
        ctx.fillText("ulazni spremnik", 18, p1y - 10);
        ctx.fillText("tje me sifona", p2x - 28, p2y - 32);
        ctx.fillText("ispust", p3x - 10, p3y + 24);

        // Particles
        particles.forEach((p, i) => {
            particles[i] += state.velocity * 0.005; if(particles[i] > 1) particles[i] = 0;
            const pos = particles[i];
            let px, py;
            if(pos < 0.4) { px = ox; py = (p1y+50) - (pos/0.4)*(p1y+50-p2y); }
            else if(pos < 0.7) { px = ox + (pos-0.4)/0.3 * (p3x-ox); py = p2y; }
            else { px = p3x; py = p2y + (pos-0.7)/0.3 * (p3y-p2y); }
            ctx.fillStyle = "#3b82f6"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(px, py, 2, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        });
    }

    function animate() {
        draw();
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    }

    fS.oninput = recalculate; vdotS.oninput = recalculate; recalculate(); animate();
})();
</script>
```


***

### Zadatak Z87 — Visina mlaza iz sapnice {.unnumbered}


Za sustav na slici, potrebno je odrediti do koje će visine iznad sapnice dospjeti mlaz vode. Prilikom 
proračuna pretpostaviti da je fluid idealan. Mjerenjem je utvrđen tlak u točki A $p_{Am} = 55 \, \text{kPa}$.

**Zadano:** $p_{Am} = 55 \, \text{kPa}, d_{cijevi}=100 \, \text{mm}, d_{sapnice}=50 \, \text{mm}, h_2=1,1 \, \text{m}$, idealan fluid, voda  
**Odrediti:** visina mlaza $h_1$

**Rješenje:**
1. $v_A = 2,43 \, \text{m/s}, v_{is} = 4 v_A = 9,72 \, \text{m/s}$.
2. Energija u A: $H_A = \frac{p_A}{\rho g} + \frac{v_A^2}{2g} + z_A = 5,62 + 0,3 + 0 = 5,92 \, \text{m}$.
3. Visina mlaza $h_1$: $z_{vrh} = H_A \implies h_1 + h_2 = 5,92 \implies h_1 = \mathbf{4,82 \, \text{m}}$.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Sapnica i Vertikalni Mlaz -->
<div id="z87-nozzle-jet-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">🚀 Pretvorba energije: Sapnica i visina mlaza</h4>

    <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;">
        <strong>Kako čitati sapnicu:</strong> Tlak u točki A daje tlačnu visinu <strong>p<sub>A</sub>/(ρg)</strong>, dio energije već je u brzini u cijevi, a u sapnici se veći dio te energije pretvara u izlaznu brzinu <strong>v<sub>is</sub></strong>. Vertikalni mlaz zatim tu kinetičku energiju pretvara natrag u visinu <strong>h₁</strong>.
    </div>
    
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 30px; align-items: start;">
        <!-- Fountain Visualization -->
        <div style="position: relative; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; overflow: hidden; height: 500px;">
            <canvas id="z87-canvas" width="500" height="500" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            
            <!-- Jet Height Indicator -->
            <div style="position: absolute; right: 20px; top: 100px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: 2px solid #3b82f6;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 800; color: #64748b;">VISINA MLAZA h₁</div>
                <div id="z87-h1-val" style="font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 800; color: #1e40af;">4.82 m</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Controls and Energy Bars -->
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="padding: 20px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #475569;">Tlak u točki A (pAm): <span id="z87-v-pa" style="color:#2563eb;">55</span> kPa</label>
                <input type="range" id="z87-pa-slider" min="10" max="100" step="1" value="55" style="width: 100%;">
                
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 15px; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #475569;">Promjer sapnice D₂: <span id="z87-v-d2" style="color:#2563eb;">50</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="z87-d2-slider" min="30" max="80" step="2" value="50" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>

            <!-- Energy Component Bars -->
            <div style="background: #ebf8ff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 15px; border-left: 6px solid #3182ce;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #2c5282; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 12px;">Sastav energije u točki A:</div>
                <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px;">
                    <div style="height: 30px; background: #e2e8f0; border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden; display: flex;">
                        <div id="z87-bar-p" style="width: 80%; background: #3b82f6; height: 100%;" title="Tlačna visina"></div>
                        <div id="z87-bar-v" style="width: 20%; background: #10b981; height: 100%;" title="Brzinska visina"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600;">
                        <span style="color: #3b82f6;">TLAK (p/ρg)</span>
                        <span style="color: #059669;">BRZINA (v²/2g)</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(130px, 1fr)); gap: 12px;">
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">p_A/ρg</div>
                    <div id="z87-phead-out" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">v_A</div>
                    <div id="z87-va-out" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m/s</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">v_is</div>
                    <div id="z87-vis-out" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m/s</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">H_A</div>
                    <div id="z87-ha-out" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fdba74; border-radius: 12px; color: #7c2d12; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.55;">
                <strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z87-explainer">Sapnica pretvara tlačnu energiju u kinetičku energiju (veliku brzinu mlaza). Ukupna energija u sustavu ostaje ista, pa mlaz doseže visinu koja odgovara ukupnoj visini energije H umanjenoj za položaj sapnice.</span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z87-canvas'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const paS = document.getElementById('z87-pa-slider'), d2S = document.getElementById('z87-d2-slider');

    let particles = [];
    for(let i=0; i<150; i++) particles.push({ x: 0, y: 0, state: 'pipe', t: Math.random() });
    const state = { h1: 0, h2: 1.1, vIs: 0 };

    function recalculate() {
        const pa_kpa = parseFloat(paS.value), d2_mm = parseFloat(d2S.value);
        const rho = 1000, g = 9.81, d1 = 0.1; // 100mm pipe
        
        // Bernoulli calculations
        const p_head = (pa_kpa * 1000) / (rho * g);
        const d2 = d2_mm / 1000;
        // From Task 87: pA/rhog + vA^2/2g + zA = v_is^2/2g + z_is
        // Also continuity: vA * A1 = v_is * A2 -> vA = v_is * (d2/d1)^2
        // Sub: p_head + (v_is^2/2g)*(d2/d1)^4 = v_is^2/2g + h2
        const h2 = 1.1; // Fixed geometry for widget
        const ratio = Math.pow(d2/d1, 4);
        const v_is_head = Math.max((p_head - h2) / (1 - ratio), 0);
        const v_is = Math.sqrt(2 * g * v_is_head);
        const vA_head = v_is_head * ratio;
        const vA = Math.sqrt(2 * g * vA_head);
        const hA = p_head + vA_head;
        
        const h1 = v_is_head; // In ideal case, jet rises to its velocity head height

        state.h1 = h1;
        state.h2 = h2;
        state.vIs = v_is;

        document.getElementById('z87-v-pa').innerText = pa_kpa;
        document.getElementById('z87-v-d2').innerText = d2_mm;
        document.getElementById('z87-h1-val').innerText = h1.toFixed(2) + " m";
        document.getElementById('z87-phead-out').innerText = p_head.toFixed(2) + " m";
        document.getElementById('z87-va-out').innerText = vA.toFixed(2) + " m/s";
        document.getElementById('z87-vis-out').innerText = v_is.toFixed(2) + " m/s";
        document.getElementById('z87-ha-out').innerText = hA.toFixed(2) + " m";
        document.getElementById('z87-explainer').textContent = `Tlak u točki A daje tlačnu visinu ${p_head.toFixed(2)} m, a zbog kontinuiteta je brzina u cijevi ${vA.toFixed(2)} m/s, dok u užoj sapnici raste na ${v_is.toFixed(2)} m/s. Ukupna energija u točki A iznosi ${hA.toFixed(2)} m, pa nakon oduzimanja geodetske visine sapnice h₂ = ${h2.toFixed(1)} m mlaz može dosegnuti visinu ${h1.toFixed(2)} m.`;
        
        // Update bars
        const total = p_head + vA_head;
        document.getElementById('z87-bar-p').style.width = (p_head/total * 100) + "%";
        document.getElementById('z87-bar-v').style.width = (vA_head/total * 100) + "%";
    }

    function draw() {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 500, 500);
        const scale = 60, ox = 250, oy = 450;
        
        // Pipe and Nozzle geometry
        ctx.fillStyle = "#f1f5f9"; ctx.strokeStyle = "#475569"; ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        // Horizontal pipe
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(50, oy); ctx.lineTo(ox-30, oy); ctx.lineTo(ox-30, oy-state.h2*scale);
        // Nozzle taper
        ctx.lineTo(ox-15, oy-state.h2*scale-20); ctx.lineTo(ox+15, oy-state.h2*scale-20);
        // Back down
        ctx.lineTo(ox+30, oy-state.h2*scale); ctx.lineTo(ox+30, oy); ctx.lineTo(50, oy);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = "#93c5fd";
        ctx.setLineDash([6, 6]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(330, oy - state.h2*scale - 20);
        ctx.lineTo(330, oy - (state.h1 + state.h2)*scale - 20);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#1d4ed8";
        ctx.font = "bold 11px Inter";
        ctx.fillText("h1", 336, oy - (state.h1 * 0.5 + state.h2)*scale - 20);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#475569";
        ctx.fillText("sapnica", ox - 18, oy - state.h2*scale - 30);

        // Particles
        particles.forEach(p => {
            p.t += 0.01 * (p.state === 'pipe' ? 1 : 2);
            if(p.t > 1) {
                p.t = 0; p.state = Math.random() > 0.3 ? 'pipe' : 'jet';
            }

            let px, py;
            if(p.state === 'pipe') {
                // Simplified pipe path
                px = 50 + p.t * (ox-50); py = oy - 15;
            } else {
                // Jet path (vertical rise and fall)
                const v0 = Math.sqrt(2 * 9.81 * state.h1);
                const time_to_top = v0 / 9.81;
                const total_time = 2 * time_to_top;
                const ct = p.t * total_time;
                
                px = ox + (Math.random()-0.5)*10;
                py = (oy - state.h2*scale - 20) - (v0*ct - 0.5*9.81*ct*ct)*scale;
            }
            
            ctx.fillStyle = "#3b82f6"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(px, py, 2, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        });

    }

    function animate() {
        draw();
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    }

    paS.oninput = recalculate; d2S.oninput = recalculate; recalculate(); animate();
})();
</script>
```

***

### Zadatak Z88 — Linijski gubici u cijevi {.unnumbered}

Voda struji kroz cijev duljine 100 m i promjera 50 mm brzinom 2 m/s. Koeficijent trenja je 0,02. Odrediti pad tlaka.

**Zadano:** $L=100 \, \text{m}, D=50 \, \text{mm}, v=2 \, \text{m/s}, \lambda=0,02$  
**Odrediti:** $\Delta p$

***

### Zadatak Z89 — Istjecanje iz velikog spremnika {.unnumbered}

 
Za veliki spremnik s otvorom na dubini $h=5 \, \text{m}$, odrediti brzinu istjecanja $v_2$ (idealan fluid).

**Zadano:** $h = 5 \, \text{m}$, idealan fluid  
**Odrediti:** $v_2$

**Rješenje:**
$v_2 = \sqrt{2gh} = \sqrt{2 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 5} = \mathbf{9,9 \, \text{m/s}}$.

```{=html}
<div class="mf1-bridge">
    <h4>Idealni kontrast</h4>
    <p>Ovaj zadatak namjerno ostaje u idealnom obliku kako bi se jasno vidjelo odakle kreće realni Bernoulli: Torricellijeva formula daje gornju granicu brzine istjecanja kada gubitke zanemarimo. U stvarnim sustavima isti račun zatim korigiramo linijskim i lokalnim gubicima.</p>
</div>
<div class="mf1-note-grid">
    <div class="mf1-kriterij">
        <h4>Kriterij primjene</h4>
        <ul>
            <li>Koristi Torricellijev zakon samo kada je spremnik velik, izlaz na atmosferi i gubici su zanemarivi ili eksplicitno izostavljeni.</li>
            <li>Ako zadatak uvodi duljinu cijevi, hrapavost, ventil ili koeficijent gubitka, više nisi u čistom idealnom slučaju i trebaš prijeći na realni Bernoulli.</li>
        </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="mf1-warning">
        <h4>Česta pogreška</h4>
        <p>Najčešća greška je uzeti $v = \sqrt{2gh}$ kao univerzalnu formulu istjecanja i primijeniti je i onda kada je već zadano da sustav ima disipaciju energije.</p>
    </div>
</div>
```


***

### Zadatak Z90 — Pitot-statička cijev (Prandtl) {.unnumbered}

Prandtlova cijev u struji vode ($\rho=1000 \, \text{kg/m}^3$) spojena je na živin manometar ($\rho_{Hg}=13600 \, \text{kg/m}^3$). Odrediti brzinu ako je $\Delta h_{Hg}=63 \, \text{mm}$.

**Zadano:** $\Delta h_{Hg}=63 \, \text{mm}, \rho_v=1000 \, \text{kg/m}^3, \rho_{Hg}=13600 \, \text{kg/m}^3$  
**Odrediti:** $v$

**Rješenje:**
$\Delta p = (\rho_{Hg} - \rho_v) g \Delta h_{Hg} = 7850 \, \text{Pa}$.
$v = \sqrt{\frac{2 \Delta p}{\rho_v}} = \mathbf{3,97 \, \text{m/s}}$.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Pitotova cijev (Premium) -->
<div id="z90-pitot-premium-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">📍 Pitot-statička cijev: Stagnacija i mjerenje brzine</h4>

    <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;">
        <strong>Kako čitati Pitot:</strong> Na vrhu sonde tok se zaustavlja pa se brzina pretvara u porast tlaka. Manometar taj porast čita kao razliku razina žive <strong>Δh<sub>Hg</sub></strong>, iz koje prvo dobivaš <strong>Δp</strong>, a zatim i brzinu iz relacije <strong>v = √(2Δp/ρ)</strong>.
    </div>
    
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 30px; align-items: start;">
        <div style="position: relative; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; overflow: hidden; height: 400px;">
            <canvas id="z90-canvas" width="550" height="400" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            
            <!-- Stagnation Tooltip -->
            <div id="z90-stagnation-label" style="position: absolute; left: 330px; top: 180px; background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.9); color: white; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 800; pointer-events: none;">
                STAGNACIJA (v=0)
            </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="padding: 20px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Brzina strujanja v: <span id="z90-v-v" style="color:#2563eb;">4.0</span> m/s</label>
                <input type="range" id="z90-v-slider" min="1" max="10" step="0.1" value="4" style="width: 100%;">
                
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Gustoća fluida ρ: <span id="z90-v-rho" style="color:#2563eb;">1000</span> kg/m³</label>
                <input type="range" id="z90-rho-slider" min="800" max="1200" step="10" value="1000" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>

            <div style="background: #f8fafc; padding: 20px; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #475569; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 12px;">Očitanje manometra (Hg):</div>
                <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 15px;">
                    <div id="z90-hg-display" style="font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #1e293b;">63</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 600;">mm Hg</div>
                </div>
                <div style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #64748b; text-align: center; margin-top: 10px;">
                    Δp = <span id="z90-res-dp">8000</span> Pa
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(130px, 1fr)); gap: 12px;">
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">Dinamička visina</div>
                    <div id="z90-res-head" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">v iz manometra</div>
                    <div id="z90-res-vcalc" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m/s</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fdba74; border-radius: 12px; color: #7c2d12; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.55;">
                <strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z90-explainer">Pitotova cijev mjeri ukupni tlak na vrhu i statički tlak na obodu. Razlika tih tlakova je dinamički tlak iz kojeg dobivamo brzinu.</span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z90-canvas'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const vSl = document.getElementById('z90-v-slider'), rSl = document.getElementById('z90-rho-slider');

    let particles = [];
    for(let i=0; i<100; i++) particles.push({ x: Math.random()*550, y: 50 + Math.random()*300 });
    const state = { velocity: 4, dhHg: 0 };

    function recalculate() {
        const v = parseFloat(vSl.value), rho = parseFloat(rSl.value);
        const rhoHg = 13600, g = 9.81;
        
        const dp = 0.5 * rho * v * v;
        const dhHg = dp / (g * (rhoHg - rho));
        const dynHead = dp / (rho * g);
        const vCalc = Math.sqrt((2 * dp) / rho);

        state.velocity = v;
        state.dhHg = dhHg;

        document.getElementById('z90-v-v').innerText = v.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z90-v-rho').innerText = rho;
        document.getElementById('z90-hg-display').innerText = (dhHg * 1000).toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('z90-res-dp').innerText = Math.round(dp);
        document.getElementById('z90-res-head').innerText = dynHead.toFixed(2) + " m";
        document.getElementById('z90-res-vcalc').innerText = vCalc.toFixed(2) + " m/s";
        document.getElementById('z90-explainer').textContent = `Za brzinu ${v.toFixed(2)} m/s dinamički tlak iznosi ${Math.round(dp)} Pa, što daje dinamičku visinu ${dynHead.toFixed(2)} m. U živinom manometru to se vidi kao razlika razina ${(dhHg * 1000).toFixed(0)} mm Hg, a povratnim računom opet dobivaš brzinu ${vCalc.toFixed(2)} m/s.`;
    }

    function draw() {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 550, 450);
        const cy = 200;

        // Flow particles
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.5)";
        particles.forEach(p => {
            p.x += state.velocity * 2; if(p.x > 550) p.x = 0;
            // Diverge around tip
            let py = p.y;
            if(p.x > 280 && p.x < 420 && Math.abs(p.y - cy) < 25) {
                py = cy + (p.y > cy ? 1 : -1) * 30;
            }
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(p.x, py, 2, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        });

        // Pipe/Background
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#e2e8f0"; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.strokeRect(0, 50, 550, 300);

        // Pitot Tube (Simplified Prandtl)
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#94a3b8"; ctx.lineWidth = 12; ctx.lineCap = "round";
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(500, cy); ctx.lineTo(350, cy); ctx.stroke(); // Main
        
        // Static port hole
        ctx.fillStyle = "#1e293b"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(420, cy-6, 3, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        ctx.font = "11px Inter";
        ctx.fillStyle = "#475569";
        ctx.fillText("statički otvor", 392, cy - 20);
        ctx.fillText("smjer strujanja", 34, 76);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(130, 70);
        ctx.lineTo(180, 70);
        ctx.lineTo(172, 64);
        ctx.moveTo(180, 70);
        ctx.lineTo(172, 76);
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#475569";
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.stroke();

        // U-Manometer
        const mx = 420, my = 350, mw = 80;
        const h_px = state.dhHg * 1500; // Scaling mm to pixels

        ctx.strokeStyle = "#475569"; ctx.lineWidth = 10;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(mx, cy-6); ctx.lineTo(mx, my);
        ctx.arc(mx + mw/2, my, mw/2, Math.PI, 0, true);
        ctx.lineTo(mx + mw, cy); ctx.stroke();

        // Mercury (Hg)
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#1e293b"; ctx.lineWidth = 6;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(mx, my - 20 + h_px/2); ctx.lineTo(mx, my);
        ctx.arc(mx + mw/2, my, mw/2, Math.PI, 0, true);
        ctx.lineTo(mx + mw, my - 20 - h_px/2); ctx.stroke();

    }

    function animate() {
        draw();
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    }

    vSl.oninput = recalculate; rSl.oninput = recalculate; recalculate(); animate();
})();
</script>
```

***

### Zadatak Z91 — Stratificirani višefazni spremnik - istjecanje {.unnumbered}

 
Veliki zatvoreni spremnik ispunjen je slojevima vode ($h_1=2 \, \text{m}$), ulja ($h_2=3 \, \text{m}$) i benzina ($h_3=1,5 \, \text{m}$). Iznad benzina je zrak pod pretlakom $p_m=80 \, \text{kPa}$. Odrediti brzinu istjecanja ulja $v_2$ kroz otvor na dnu sloja ulja.

**Zadano:** $h_1=2 \, \text{m}, h_2=3 \, \text{m}, h_3=1,5 \, \text{m}, p_m=80 \, \text{kPa}, \rho_b=720 \, \text{kg/m}^3, \rho_u=850 \, \text{kg/m}^3$  
**Odrediti:** $v_2$

**Rješenje:**
1. Tlak na gornjoj plohi ulja: $p_{u1} = p_m + \rho_b g h_3 = 80000 + 720 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 1,5 = \mathbf{90,6 \, \text{kPa}}$.
2. Bernoulli za ulje (od vrha do otvora): $\frac{p_{u1}}{\rho_u g} + h_2 = \frac{p_{atm}}{\rho_u g} + \frac{v_2^2}{2g}$.
3. Brzina: $v_2 = \sqrt{2 \frac{p_{u1,m}}{\rho_u} + 2 g h_2} = \sqrt{2 \frac{90600}{850} + 2 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 3} = \mathbf{16,5 \, \text{m/s}}$.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Višefazni spremnik (Voda, Ulje, Benzin, Zrak) -->
<div id="z91-multiphase-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">🛢️ Višefazni spremnik: Istjecanje stratificiranih fluida</h4>

    <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;">
        <strong>Kako čitati višefazni spremnik:</strong> Ulje na otvoru ne “osjeća” cijeli spremnik jednako, nego samo tlak na svojoj gornjoj plohi i vlastitu geodetsku razliku do otvora. Zato se brzina ulja ovdje gradi iz <strong>pretlaka zraka</strong>, doprinosa sloja <strong>benzina</strong> i visine samog <strong>uljnog stupca</strong>, dok donji vodeni sloj ne ulazi u Bernoullijevu vezu za ovaj otvor.
    </div>
    
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 30px; align-items: start;">
        <div style="position: relative; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; overflow: hidden; height: 500px;">
            <canvas id="z91-canvas" width="500" height="500" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            <div style="position: absolute; left: 10px; top: 10px; font-size: 0.65rem; color: #64748b; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); padding: 5px; border-radius: 4px;"><b>Slojevi fluida</b></div>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px;">
            <div style="padding: 18px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; color: #475569;">Pretlak zraka pm: <span id="z91-v-pm">80</span> kPa</label>
                <input type="range" id="z91-pm-slider" min="0" max="200" step="5" value="80" style="width: 100%;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 15px; color: #475569;">Visina ulja h₂: <span id="z91-v-h2">3.0</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z91-h2-slider" min="1" max="5" step="0.1" value="3" style="width: 100%;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 15px; color: #475569;">Visina benzina h₃: <span id="z91-v-h3">1.5</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z91-h3-slider" min="0.5" max="3" step="0.1" value="1.5" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            <div style="background: #fff7ed; padding: 18px; border-radius: 15px; border-left: 6px solid #f97316;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9a3412;">PRORAČUN (ULJE):</div>
                <div style="font-size: 0.95rem; margin-top: 5px;">Tlak pu1: <b id="z91-res-pu1">90.6 kPa</b></div>
                <div style="font-size: 1.1rem; margin-top: 5px;">Brzina v₂: <b id="z91-res-v2" style="color: #c2410c;">16.5 m/s</b></div>
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(130px, 1fr)); gap: 12px;">
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">p_m/ρ_u g</div>
                    <div id="z91-res-pmhead" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">ρ_b g h₃ / ρ_u g</div>
                    <div id="z91-res-benzhead" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">v₂²/2g</div>
                    <div id="z91-res-vhead" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fdba74; border-radius: 12px; color: #7c2d12; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.55;">
                <strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z91-explainer"></span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z91-canvas'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const pmS = document.getElementById('z91-pm-slider'), h2S = document.getElementById('z91-h2-slider'), h3S = document.getElementById('z91-h3-slider');
    let particles = []; for(let i=0; i<100; i++) particles.push({ t: Math.random() });
    const state = { h1: 2.0, h2: 3.0, h3: 1.5, v2: 0 };
    function recalculate() {
        const pm = parseFloat(pmS.value), h2 = parseFloat(h2S.value), h3 = parseFloat(h3S.value), g = 9.81, rho_b = 720, rho_u = 850;
        const pu1 = pm*1000 + rho_b*g*h3;
        const pmHead = (pm * 1000) / (rho_u * g);
        const benzHead = (rho_b * g * h3) / (rho_u * g);
        const v2 = Math.sqrt(2*pu1/rho_u + 2*g*h2);
        const vHead = v2 * v2 / (2 * g);
        state.h2 = h2;
        state.h3 = h3;
        state.v2 = v2;
        document.getElementById('z91-v-pm').innerText = pm;
        document.getElementById('z91-v-h2').innerText = h2.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z91-v-h3').innerText = h3.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z91-res-pu1').innerText = (pu1/1000).toFixed(1) + " kPa";
        document.getElementById('z91-res-v2').innerText = v2.toFixed(1) + " m/s";
        document.getElementById('z91-res-pmhead').innerText = pmHead.toFixed(2) + " m";
        document.getElementById('z91-res-benzhead').innerText = benzHead.toFixed(2) + " m";
        document.getElementById('z91-res-vhead').innerText = vHead.toFixed(2) + " m";
        document.getElementById('z91-explainer').textContent = `Pretlak zraka doprinosi s ${pmHead.toFixed(2)} m uljne visine, a sloj benzina dodaje još ${benzHead.toFixed(2)} m. Kad se tome pridruži geodetska visina ulja h₂ = ${h2.toFixed(1)} m, ukupna raspoloživa energija daje brzinsku visinu ${vHead.toFixed(2)} m, odnosno izlaznu brzinu ulja ${v2.toFixed(2)} m/s.`;
    }
    function draw() {
        ctx.clearRect(0,0,500,500); const scale = 40, w = 250, ox = 100, oy = 450;
        ctx.fillStyle="#3b82f6"; ctx.fillRect(ox,oy-state.h1*scale,w,state.h1*scale);
        ctx.fillStyle="#f59e0b"; ctx.fillRect(ox,oy-(state.h1+state.h2)*scale,w,state.h2*scale);
        ctx.fillStyle="#facc15"; ctx.fillRect(ox,oy-(state.h1+state.h2+state.h3)*scale,w,state.h3*scale);
        ctx.fillStyle="#e2e8f0"; ctx.fillRect(ox,oy-400,w,400-(state.h1+state.h2+state.h3)*scale);
        ctx.strokeStyle="#1e293b"; ctx.lineWidth=3; ctx.strokeRect(ox,oy-400,w,400);
        const pY = oy-state.h1*scale; ctx.fillStyle="#1e293b"; ctx.fillRect(ox+w,pY-10,10,20);
        ctx.fillStyle="#1e293b"; ctx.font = "bold 11px Inter";
        ctx.fillText("zrak", ox + 12, oy - 380);
        ctx.fillStyle="#fef3c7"; ctx.fillText("benzin", ox + 12, oy-(state.h1+state.h2+0.45*state.h3)*scale);
        ctx.fillStyle="#7c2d12"; ctx.fillText("ulje", ox + 12, oy-(state.h1+0.55*state.h2)*scale);
        ctx.fillStyle="#1d4ed8"; ctx.fillText("voda", ox + 12, oy-0.55*state.h1*scale);
        particles.forEach(p => {
            p.t+=0.01*(state.v2/10); if(p.t>1) p.t=0;
            ctx.fillStyle="#f59e0b"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(ox+w+p.t*150, pY+0.5*9.81*Math.pow(p.t*0.5,2)*scale, 2, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        });
    }
    function animate() {
        draw();
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    }
    [pmS, h2S, h3S].forEach(s => s.oninput = recalculate); recalculate(); animate();
})();
</script>
```



***

### Zadatak Z92 — Protočna sapnica u cijevi {.unnumbered}

 
Odrediti protok $\dot{V}$ kroz cijev $d_c=200 \, \text{mm}$ sa sapnicom $d_s=30 \, \text{mm}$ ako je razlika u Hg manometru $20 \, \text{mm}$ ($c_c=0,95$).

**Zadano:** $d_c=200 \, \text{mm}, d_s=30 \, \text{mm}, \Delta h_{Hg} = 20 \, \text{mm}, c_c=0,95$  
**Odrediti:** $\dot{V}$

**Rješenje:**
1. $\Delta p = (\rho_{Hg}-\rho_v)g h = 2472 \, \text{Pa}$.
2. $\dot{V} = c_c \frac{A_s}{\sqrt{1-(A_s/A_c)^2}} \sqrt{\frac{2\Delta p}{\rho_v}} = \mathbf{1,5 \, \text{dm}^3\text{/s}}$.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Protočna sapnica i Vena Contracta -->
<div id="z92-nozzle-contracta-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">📏 Protočna sapnica i Vena Contracta</h4>

    <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;">
        <strong>Kako čitati sapnicu:</strong> Manometar najprije daje tlačni pad <strong>Δp</strong>, zatim geometrija određuje idealni presjek sapnice <strong>A<sub>s</sub></strong>, a koeficijent kontrakcije <strong>C<sub>c</sub></strong> ga smanjuje na efektivni presjek vene contracte. Upravo taj manji presjek određuje stvarni protok.
    </div>
    
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 30px; align-items: start;">
        <div style="position: relative; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; overflow: hidden; height: 400px;">
            <canvas id="z92-canvas" width="550" height="400" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            
            <!-- Vena Contracta Highlight -->
            <div id="z92-vena-label" style="position: absolute; left: 300px; top: 220px; background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.9); color: white; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 800; pointer-events: none; opacity: 0.8;">
                VENA CONTRACTA
            </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="padding: 20px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Koeficijent kontrakcije Cc: <span id="z92-v-cc" style="color:#2563eb;">0.95</span></label>
                <input type="range" id="z92-cc-slider" min="0.6" max="1.0" step="0.01" value="0.95" style="width: 100%;">
                
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Razlika razina h (Hg): <span id="z92-v-h" style="color:#2563eb;">20</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="z92-h-slider" min="5" max="100" step="1" value="20" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>

            <div style="background: #fff7ed; padding: 20px; border-radius: 15px; border-left: 6px solid #f97316;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9a3412; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 12px;">Proračun protoka:</div>
                <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; font-size: 1.1rem; color: #9a3412;">
                    Stvarni protok V̇: <b id="z92-res-vdot">1.50 L/s</b>
                </div>
                <div style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #c2410c; margin-top: 8px;">
                    Efektivni presjek struje je manji od geometrijskog otvora sapnice.
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(130px, 1fr)); gap: 12px;">
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">Δp</div>
                    <div id="z92-res-dp" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0 Pa</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">A_s</div>
                    <div id="z92-res-as" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.0000 m²</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">C_c A_s</div>
                    <div id="z92-res-aeff" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.0000 m²</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fdba74; border-radius: 12px; color: #7c2d12; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.55;">
                <strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z92-explainer">Zbog tromosti fluida, strujnice se nastavljaju sužavati i nakon prolaska kroz sapnicu. Najmanji presjek struje određuje stvarni protok.</span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z92-canvas'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const ccS = document.getElementById('z92-cc-slider'), hS = document.getElementById('z92-h-slider');

    let particles = [];
    for(let i=0; i<120; i++) particles.push({ x: Math.random()*550, y_rel: Math.random() });
    const state = { cc: 0.95, hMm: 20 };

    function recalculate() {
        const cc = parseFloat(ccS.value), h_mm = parseFloat(hS.value);
        const rho = 1000, rhoHg = 13600, g = 9.81;
        const dc = 0.2, ds = 0.03;
        
        const dp = (rhoHg - rho) * g * (h_mm / 1000);
        const area_s = Math.PI * ds * ds / 4;
        const area_c = Math.PI * dc * dc / 4;
        const area_eff = cc * area_s;
        
        const vdot = cc * (area_s / Math.sqrt(1 - Math.pow(area_s/area_c, 2))) * Math.sqrt(2 * dp / rho);

        state.cc = cc;
        state.hMm = h_mm;

        document.getElementById('z92-v-cc').innerText = cc.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z92-v-h').innerText = h_mm;
        document.getElementById('z92-res-vdot').innerText = (vdot * 1000).toFixed(2) + " L/s";
        document.getElementById('z92-res-dp').innerText = Math.round(dp) + " Pa";
        document.getElementById('z92-res-as').innerText = area_s.toFixed(4) + " m²";
        document.getElementById('z92-res-aeff').innerText = area_eff.toFixed(4) + " m²";
        document.getElementById('z92-explainer').textContent = `Razlika razina ${h_mm.toFixed(0)} mm Hg daje tlačni pad ${Math.round(dp)} Pa. Geometrijski presjek sapnice je ${area_s.toFixed(4)} m², ali zbog koeficijenta kontrakcije ${cc.toFixed(2)} efektivni presjek pada na ${area_eff.toFixed(4)} m², pa stvarni protok iznosi ${(vdot * 1000).toFixed(2)} L/s.`;
    }

    function draw() {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 550, 450);
        const cy = 200;
        const dc_px = 150, ds_px = 40;
        const d_vena = ds_px * state.cc;

        // Pipe
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#475569"; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.strokeRect(0, cy - dc_px/2, 550, dc_px);

        // Nozzle (Orifice Plate style for clarity)
        ctx.fillStyle = "#94a3b8";
        ctx.fillRect(250, cy - dc_px/2, 10, (dc_px - ds_px)/2);
        ctx.fillRect(250, cy + ds_px/2, 10, (dc_px - ds_px)/2);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#475569";
        ctx.font = "11px Inter";
        ctx.fillText("sapnica", 232, cy - dc_px/2 - 10);
        ctx.fillText("vena contracta", 320, cy - d_vena/2 - 10);

        // Streamlines and Vena Contracta shape
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1)";
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(0, cy - dc_px/2);
        ctx.lineTo(250, cy - dc_px/2);
        ctx.bezierCurveTo(270, cy - dc_px/2, 280, cy - d_vena/2, 310, cy - d_vena/2);
        ctx.lineTo(550, cy - d_vena/2);
        ctx.lineTo(550, cy + d_vena/2);
        ctx.lineTo(310, cy + d_vena/2);
        ctx.bezierCurveTo(280, cy + d_vena/2, 270, cy + dc_px/2, 250, cy + dc_px/2);
        ctx.lineTo(0, cy + dc_px/2);
        ctx.fill();

        // Particles
        particles.forEach(p => {
            let local_d = dc_px;
            if(p.x < 250) local_d = dc_px;
            else if(p.x < 310) {
                const t = (p.x - 250) / 60;
                local_d = dc_px - (dc_px - d_vena) * t;
            } else local_d = d_vena;

            p.x += (dc_px / local_d) * 2;
            if(p.x > 550) p.x = 0;
            const py = cy + (p.y_rel - 0.5) * local_d * 0.9;
            ctx.fillStyle = "#3b82f6"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(p.x, py, 2, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        });

        // U-Manometer (Simplified)
        const mx = 150, my = 350, mw = 150;
        const h_px = state.hMm * 1.5;
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#475569"; ctx.lineWidth = 10;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(mx, cy + dc_px/2); ctx.lineTo(mx, my);
        ctx.arc(mx + mw/2, my, mw/2, Math.PI, 0, true); ctx.lineTo(mx + mw + 50, cy + dc_px/2); ctx.stroke();
        
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#1e293b"; ctx.lineWidth = 6;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(mx, my - 20 + h_px/2); ctx.lineTo(mx, my);
        ctx.arc(mx + mw/2, my, mw/2, Math.PI, 0, true);
        ctx.lineTo(mx + mw, my - 20 - h_px/2); ctx.stroke();

    }

    function animate() {
        draw();
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    }

    ccS.oninput = recalculate; hS.oninput = recalculate; recalculate(); animate();
})();
</script>
```

***

### Zadatak Z93 — Lokalni gubitak (Koljeno) {.unnumbered}

Voda struji brzinom 3 m/s kroz koljeno 90° (ζ=0,5). Odrediti pad tlaka u koljenu.

**Zadano:** $v=3 \, \text{m/s}, \zeta=0,5$  
**Odrediti:** $\Delta p$

***

### Zadatak Z94 — -95: Venturi cijev i podizanje tekućine {.unnumbered}

**Z94:** Odrediti minimalnu brzinu u Venturi cijevi potrebnu da se podigne voda iz spremnika na visinu od 1 m.

**Zadano:** $h=1 \, \text{m}, d_1=100 \, \text{mm}, d_2=40 \, \text{mm}$  
**Odrediti:** $v_{min}$

**Z95:** Cjevovod s tri koljena i ventilom spaja dva spremnika. Odrediti protok uzimajući u obzir sve gubitke.

**Zadano:** $\Delta z=10 \, \text{m}, L=50 \, \text{m}, d=100 \, \text{mm}, \Sigma\zeta=2,5$  
**Odrediti:** $\dot{V}$

**Rješenje (95):**
$v_2 = \mathbf{2,536 \, \text{m/s}}$ (uz gubike), $\dot{V} = \mathbf{0,0448 \, \text{m}^3\text{/s}}$.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Venturi Ejektor (Usis) -->
<div id="z94-ejector-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">🌬️ Venturi ejektor: Podizanje tekućine podtlakom</h4>

    <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;">
        <strong>Kako čitati ejektor:</strong> Kontinuitet prvo poveća brzinu u grlu na <strong>v₂</strong>, Bernoulli zatim snižava tlak u grlu na <strong>p_grlo</strong>, a onda taj podtlak uspoređuješ s potrebnim hidrostatskim tlakom stupca <strong>-ρgh</strong>. Minimalna brzina <strong>v₁,min</strong> je upravo ona pri kojoj ta dva uvjeta postanu jednaka.
    </div>
    
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 30px; align-items: start;">
        <div style="position: relative; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; overflow: hidden; height: 400px;">
            <canvas id="z94-canvas" width="550" height="400" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            
            <!-- Pressure/Suction Gauge -->
            <div id="z94-suction-info" style="position: absolute; left: 275px; top: 20px; transform: translateX(-50%); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 10px; border: 2px solid #3b82f6; text-align: center;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 800; color: #64748b;">TLAK U GRLU (gauge)</div>
                <div id="z94-p-throat" style="font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #ef4444;">-15.2 kPa</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="padding: 20px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Ulazna brzina v₁: <span id="z94-v-v1" style="color:#2563eb;">2.0</span> m/s</label>
                <input type="range" id="z94-v1-slider" min="0.5" max="10" step="0.1" value="2" style="width: 100%;">
                
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Visina usisa h: <span id="z94-v-h" style="color:#2563eb;">1.0</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z94-h-slider" min="0.2" max="3" step="0.1" value="1" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>

            <div id="z94-status-card" style="background: #f0fdf4; padding: 20px; border-radius: 15px; border-left: 6px solid #22c55e;">
                <div id="z94-status-text" style="font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.9rem; color: #166534; text-align: center;">TEKUĆINA SE PODIŽE! ✅</div>
                <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #15803d; margin-top: 8px; line-height: 1.4; text-align: center;">
                    Tlak u grlu je manji od hidrostatskog tlaka stupca h.
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(130px, 1fr)); gap: 12px;">
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">v₂ u grlu</div>
                    <div id="z94-v2-out" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m/s</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">Potreban tlak</div>
                    <div id="z94-pneed-out" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.0 kPa</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">v₁,min</div>
                    <div id="z94-vmin-out" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m/s</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fdba74; border-radius: 12px; color: #7c2d12; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.55;">
                <strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z94-explainer">Velika brzina u grlu Venturijeve cijevi stvara zonu niskog tlaka. Ako je taj tlak dovoljno nizak, atmosferski tlak pogurat će tekućinu iz donjeg spremnika prema gore.</span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z94-canvas'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const v1S = document.getElementById('z94-v1-slider'), hS = document.getElementById('z94-h-slider');

    let particles = [];
    for(let i=0; i<100; i++) particles.push({ x: Math.random()*550, y_rel: Math.random() });
    const state = { v1: 2, h: 1, v2: 0, isSucking: false, pThroat: 0, pNeeded: 0 };

    function recalculate() {
        const v1 = parseFloat(v1S.value), h = parseFloat(hS.value);
        const rho = 1000, g = 9.81, d1 = 0.1, d2 = 0.04;
        
        const v2 = v1 * Math.pow(d1/d2, 2);
        const dp = 0.5 * rho * (v1*v1 - v2*v2); // p2 - p1 (gauge, p1=0)
        const p_throat_kpa = dp / 1000;
        
        const p_needed_kpa = -rho * g * h / 1000;
        const ratio = Math.pow(d1 / d2, 4);
        const v1Min = Math.sqrt((2 * g * h) / Math.max(ratio - 1, 1e-6));
        const isSucking = p_throat_kpa < p_needed_kpa;

        state.v1 = v1;
        state.h = h;
        state.v2 = v2;
        state.isSucking = isSucking;
        state.pThroat = p_throat_kpa;
        state.pNeeded = p_needed_kpa;

        document.getElementById('z94-v-v1').innerText = v1.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z94-v-h').innerText = h.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z94-p-throat').innerText = p_throat_kpa.toFixed(1) + " kPa";
        document.getElementById('z94-v2-out').innerText = v2.toFixed(2) + " m/s";
        document.getElementById('z94-pneed-out').innerText = p_needed_kpa.toFixed(1) + " kPa";
        document.getElementById('z94-vmin-out').innerText = v1Min.toFixed(2) + " m/s";
        document.getElementById('z94-explainer').textContent = `Ulazna brzina ${v1.toFixed(2)} m/s daje brzinu u grlu ${v2.toFixed(2)} m/s, pa tlak u grlu pada na ${p_throat_kpa.toFixed(1)} kPa. Za podizanje stupca visine ${h.toFixed(1)} m potreban je tlak barem ${p_needed_kpa.toFixed(1)} kPa, pa je minimalna ulazna brzina ${v1Min.toFixed(2)} m/s${isSucking ? ' i uvjet je zadovoljen.' : ', zato trenutačni režim još ne usisava tekućinu.'}`;
        
        const statusCard = document.getElementById('z94-status-card');
        const statusText = document.getElementById('z94-status-text');
        if(isSucking) {
            statusCard.style.background = "#f0fdf4"; statusCard.style.borderLeftColor = "#22c55e";
            statusText.innerText = "TEKUĆINA SE PODIŽE! ✅"; statusText.style.color = "#166534";
        } else {
            statusCard.style.background = "#fef2f2"; statusCard.style.borderLeftColor = "#ef4444";
            statusText.innerText = "NEDOVOLJAN PODTLAK ❌"; statusText.style.color = "#991b1b";
        }
    }

    function draw() {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 550, 450);
        const cy = 150;
        const d1_px = 60, d2_px = 20;

        // Lower Reservoir
        ctx.fillStyle = "#ebf8ff"; ctx.fillRect(225, 350, 100, 40);
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#475569"; ctx.lineWidth = 2; ctx.strokeRect(225, 350, 100, 40);

        // Suction Tube
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#cbd5e0"; ctx.lineWidth = 8;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(275, cy + d2_px/2); ctx.lineTo(275, 370); ctx.stroke();

        // Venturi Pipe
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(241, 245, 249, 0.8)";
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(0, cy - d1_px/2); ctx.lineTo(150, cy - d1_px/2);
        ctx.bezierCurveTo(220, cy - d1_px/2, 230, cy - d2_px/2, 275, cy - d2_px/2);
        ctx.bezierCurveTo(320, cy - d2_px/2, 330, cy - d1_px/2, 400, cy - d1_px/2);
        ctx.lineTo(550, cy - d1_px/2); ctx.lineTo(550, cy + d1_px/2); ctx.lineTo(400, cy + d1_px/2);
        ctx.bezierCurveTo(330, cy + d1_px/2, 320, cy + d2_px/2, 275, cy + d2_px/2);
        ctx.bezierCurveTo(230, cy + d2_px/2, 220, cy + d1_px/2, 150, cy + d1_px/2);
        ctx.lineTo(0, cy + d1_px/2); ctx.fill(); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.fillStyle = "#475569";
        ctx.font = "11px Inter";
        ctx.fillText("grlo", 262, cy - d2_px/2 - 10);
        ctx.fillText("usis", 286, 318);

        // Liquid in Suction Tube
        const rise_perc = Math.min(state.pThroat / state.pNeeded, 1.0);
        const current_h_px = (370 - (cy + d2_px/2)) * Math.max(rise_perc, 0);
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#3b82f6"; ctx.lineWidth = 5;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(275, 370); ctx.lineTo(275, 370 - current_h_px); ctx.stroke();

        // Particles
        particles.forEach(p => {
            let local_d = d1_px;
            if(p.x > 150 && p.x < 400) {
                const t = Math.abs(p.x - 275) / 125;
                local_d = d2_px + (d1_px - d2_px) * (t * t);
            }
            p.x += (d1_px / local_d) * state.v1 * 3;
            if(p.x > 550) p.x = 0;
            const py = cy + (p.y_rel - 0.5) * local_d * 0.8;
            ctx.fillStyle = "#3b82f6"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(p.x, py, 2, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        });
    }

    function animate() {
        draw();
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    }

    v1S.oninput = recalculate; hS.oninput = recalculate; recalculate(); animate();
})();
</script>
```
